data.title: Create emit-protocol-review-result.sh wrapper
data.description:
## Description

Create plugins/dso/scripts/emit-protocol-review-result.sh that assembles plan/fidelity review event data and calls emit-review-event.sh.

CLI args: --review-type (implementation-plan|brainstorm-fidelity|architectural), --pass-fail, --revision-cycles
File-sourced: review-protocol-output.json from $(get_artifacts_dir) — extract dimension_scores, compute finding_counts_by_severity from findings[].

Invocation: $SCRIPT_DIR/emit-review-event.sh review_result '<json>'
Best-effort: return 0 even if emit fails, log warning to stderr.

## TDD Requirement
GREEN — Task 1 RED tests pass.

## Files to Modify
- plugins/dso/scripts/emit-protocol-review-result.sh (create)

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] All tests pass
  Verify: bash tests/run-all.sh
- [ ] Script exists and is executable
  Verify: test -x plugins/dso/scripts/emit-protocol-review-result.sh
- [ ] All 5 wrapper tests pass
  Verify: bash tests/scripts/test-emit-protocol-review-result.sh
